images.alt: DC-style comic illustration of Batgirl (Barbara Gordon) sitting on a metal fire escape at night in Gotham City, cowl removed and resting beside her, long red hair slightly messy, wearing her iconic black and yellow suit with cape draped naturally. She has a tired, introspective expression, slightly slouched posture, holding a lit cigarette between her fingers with subtle smoke curling upward. The city skyline stretches behind her with glowing windows, neon lights, and a softly illuminated Bat-Signal in the cloudy sky. OKRs = your GPS (where are we going?)

4. Wormwood — A bitter plant; also signifies deep sorrow, bitterness, or a source of affliction.
